Our Saunas

Standard models, custom builds, and mobile saunas

Why Traditional Finnish Saunas?

Not all saunas are created equal. Here's why our construction method delivers a superior experience that lasts decades.

Our Finnish Saunas

Built Like Your Home
  • ✓ Fully insulated envelope (R-13+ walls)
  • ✓ 2x4 framing with vapor barrier
  • ✓ Interior cedar cladding + exterior metal
  • ✓ Proper löyly (steam) at 80-100°C
  • ✓ Heats evenly, retains heat efficiently
  • ✓ Built to last 25+ years outdoors
  • ✓ Proven health benefits over millennia

Barrel Saunas

Common Alternative
  • ✗ No insulation (single-wall construction)
  • ✗ Stave construction with metal bands
  • ✗ Exposed wood inside and out
  • ✗ Difficult to achieve proper heat
  • ✗ Loses heat quickly in cold weather
  • ✗ 5-10 year lifespan typical
  • ✗ Higher energy costs to operate

Infrared "Saunas"

Not a True Sauna
  • ✗ Heats your body, not the air
  • ✗ No steam (löyly) possible
  • ✗ Max temp ~60°C (not hot enough)
  • ✗ No authentic sauna experience
  • ✗ Unproven long-term health claims
  • ✗ Often made with cheap materials
  • ✗ Indoor use only

Rooted in Science

Traditional Finnish sauna bathing isn't just relaxing—it's backed by decades of peer-reviewed research.

40%

Lower risk of cardiovascular disease with regular sauna use (4-7x/week)

— JAMA Internal Medicine
66%

Reduction in dementia risk for frequent sauna bathers

— University of Eastern Finland
24%

Lower all-cause mortality for those who sauna 4+ times weekly

— 20-year Finnish study

Standard Builds

Handcrafted in Squamish, B.C. Every model features three-tier Western Red Cedar benches, panoramic windows, and accent walls as standard. Speakers and integrated lighting available across the range.

S2

2–3 Person

Our most compact build. Full Finnish performance in a 5x7 footprint. Two layout options: maximize seating or dedicate more space to the upper bench.

5' × 7' From $22,500

S4

4–5 Person

Our most popular residential model. Flexible bench configuration with room to find your preferred heat level across all three tiers.

7' × 7' From $29,000

S6

6–7 Person

Room for a proper group session. Wood-burning or electric. Available with front deck. Built as mobile on a trailer or semi-permanent on skids.

9' × 7' From $35,500

S8

8–10 Person

Our largest standard build. Full three-tier benching with room to move. Wood-burning or electric, with optional front deck.

12' × 7' From $44,000

SC

10–14 Person

Commercial-grade performance. Durable epoxy flooring, reinforced benches, upgraded trim. Optional changing room and front deck. Built for resorts, gyms, and wellness centers. Custom sizes available.

12' × 7'+ From $57,000
Get Your Quote

Custom Builds

Designed for your property, built to your vision. From intimate backyard saunas to commercial installations, each custom build begins with understanding how you'll use the space.

Inquire about custom →

Mobile Builds

Fully equipped, road-ready saunas for hospitality partners and rental operators. Designed for durability and ease of use. Available for lease, rental partnerships, or purchase.

Inquire about mobile →

Our Work

A selection of recent builds across British Columbia.

Designed by Finnish Standards, Inspired by Tradition and Rooted in Science.

  • One large window
